markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Re-align on project scope, strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog Wireframes:** GrowthX will deliver wireframes for the blog homepage and category pages by Thursday, unblocking the project's kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - **Strategic Focus:** The team will prioritize Google SEO to capture AI Overviews, as Google drives \~95% of traffic vs. ChatGPT's \<250k monthly visits.
  - [**Cross-Promotion:** A key mandate from the CMO is to cross-promote between the consumer and UB blogs to capture high-value lead-gen from individual learners.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Content Expansion:** GrowthX will deepen AI keyword research and is open to expanding into non-AI topics like "Technical Upskilling" and "Leadership & Management."](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

## Topics

### Project Status & Blockers

  - [The project was paused; the next step is a wireframe for a "well-converting blog."](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [The wireframe is for layout and debate, not final design.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The project is stalled until the wireframe is approved, which will then unblock the kickoff call with Udemy's dev and design teams.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Blog Structure & Wireframe Requirements

  - [The wireframe must include a homepage and category pages.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Category Page Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [Dedicated pages with a paragraph-long content chunk.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [URLs should *not* contain the category (e.g., `/blog/article-title`).](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [**Inspiration:** The Coursera blog was cited as a good example.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)

### Content Strategy & Focus

  - [**Priority:** Deepen AI keyword research for topics like "upskilling" and "AI literacy."](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Constraint:** New research must be structured to avoid content overlap with existing categories.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Future Expansion:** GrowthX is open to researching non-AI topics like "Technical Upskilling" and "Leadership & Management" after the initial AI focus.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

### SEO Strategy: Google vs. LLMs

  - [**Primary Focus → Google SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - **Rationale:** Google drives \~95% of traffic vs. ChatGPT's \<250k monthly visits.
      - [**Goal:** Capture AI Overviews on Google.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [**Secondary Focus → LLM Citations:**](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Tracking Gap:** No UB-specific prompts are tracked in BrightEdge; the current list is for the consumer business.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Action:** Create a list of UB-specific prompts for BrightEdge tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [**Exploration:** A supplemental tool is being considered for persona-based LLM tracking (a feature BrightEdge lacks).](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Process:** Write solid content for users first; LLM citations are expected to follow.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Cross-Promotion Mandate

  - [**Source:** A directive from CMO Genefa.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Goal:** Drive lead-gen by cross-promoting between the consumer and UB blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Individual learners are often decision-makers for their teams.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [**Requirement:** The new blog structure must include a strategic mechanism for cross-promotion, not just simple banners.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Page Speed:** Dev Kevin is in a 2-week sprint to fix page speed on the WordPress site, starting with high-priority pages.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**Authorship Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
      - [**Pillar Content:** Published under a senior leader's name (e.g., Steph) and always reviewed.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
      - [**Non-Pillar Content:** Published under copywriter Jay's name.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
          - [All pieces will be reviewed by a small internal team initially.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
          - [The process will be delegated to Jay once it's honed.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [**Content Calendar:** GrowthX is building a shared calendar in Airtable to align with Jay's work and provide visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
      - [Deliver blog homepage and category page wireframes for review (due Thursday).](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
      - [Deepen AI keyword research for the content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1859.0)
      - [Send the GSC/GA alias to Justin for access.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Develop a strategic cross-promotion plan for the wireframe.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [Build the shared content calendar in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [**Udemy:**](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [Grant GSC and GA access to the GrowthX alias.](https://fathom.video/share/AzmnBwdnuePY4kyLyHwnZ9TE3Yy4AvJi?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
